2026 BELGIAN GRAND PRIX
17 - 19 July 2026
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To All Teams, All Officials
Document 61
Date 19 July 2026
Time 17:25
Title Infringement - Race Deleted Lap Times
Description Race Deleted Lap Times
Enclosed BEL DOC 61 - Race Deleted Lap Times .pdf
Gerd Ennser Matthew Selley
Alfonso Orihuela Pedro Lamy
Loïc Bacquelaine

 
 
2026 BELGIAN GRAND PRIX 
17 – 19 July 2026 
 
  
  
From The Stewards      Document 61 
  
To All Officials, All Teams      Date  19 July 2026 
 
        T i m e   17:25 
  
 
The Stewards, having received a report from the Race Director, have considered the following matter and determine the 
following: 
 
Session Race 
  
Fact The F1 cars below did not use the track at turns 4, 6 and 19. 
 
No. Turn Car Driver Competitor Time of Day Lap Time 
1 4 55  Carlos Sainz Atlassian Williams F1 Team 15:14:32 1:53.978 
2 4 11  Sergio Perez Cadillac Formula 1 Team 15:22:16 1:53.477 
3 4 14 Fernando Alonso Aston Martin Aramco F1 Team 15:24:17 1:55.304 
4 4 12 Kimi Antonelli Mercedes-AMG PETRONAS F1 Team 15:25:32 1:51.090 
5 4 44 Lewis Hamilton Scuderia Ferrari HP 15:38:35 2:02.860 
6 6 30 Liam Lawson Visa Cash App Racing Bulls F1 Team 15:37:34 1:53.39
